title: Verilog Parser Failure
body:
Yosys Version: 06104249406972de01d0360df63a32cafcdf2ec5

## Steps to reproduce the issue

Run the following command: yosys -f "verilog -sv " -p "synth_ice40 -top Task_Test_Top -json Task_Test_Top.json" Task_Test_Top.v

with the below code:

**Task_Test_Top.v**
```
module Task_Test_Top
(
);

    task SomeTaskName(a)
    endtask

endmodule
```
## Expected behavior

Some sort of syntax error message.

## Actual behavior

Yosys parser fails with the below error message:

**ERROR**: Internal error - should not happen - no AST_WIRE node.
